items.title: Market Uncertainty Grows as Stocks Retrace Gains Following Jobs Report
items.content: Jim Caron, CIO of the Portfolio Solutions Group at Morgan Stanley Investment Management, discusses the current state of the stock market heading into the second half of the year. Despite significant gains earlier in the year, Caron addresses whether investors should remain overweight in equities amid recent volatility. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Jim Caron, CIO of the Portfolio Solutions Group at Morgan Stanley Investment Management, discusses the current state of the stock market heading into the second half of the year. Despite significant gains earlier in the year, Caron addresses whether investors should remain overweight in equities amid recent volatility. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 随着就业报告发布后股市回调，市场不确定性加剧。摩根士丹利投资管理公司投资组合解决方案集团首席投资官吉姆·卡隆在《The Close》节目中接受采访时，讨论了上半年股市显著上涨后，投资者是否应继续增持股票。卡隆分析了当前市场状况，并探讨了下半年股市的潜在波动性。（约80字）
summaries.en: Market uncertainty rises as stocks retrace gains after the jobs report. Jim Caron, CIO of Morgan Stanley Investment Management, discusses the stock market's state, addressing whether investors should stay overweight in equities amid recent volatility. The insights come from a Bloomberg report on "The Close." (Word count: 50)

items.summary: 随着就业报告发布后股市回调，市场不确定性加剧。摩根士丹利投资管理公司投资组合解决方案集团首席投资官吉姆·卡隆在《The Close》节目中接受采访时，讨论了上半年股市显著上涨后，投资者是否应继续增持股票。卡隆分析了当前市场状况，并探讨了下半年股市的潜在波动性。（约80字）

items.title: Crusoe in Talks to Raise $3 Billion in Round That May Triple Firm’s Value
items.content: Crusoe, the data center upstart with contracts to supply AI computing power for the likes of Meta Platforms Inc. and Oracle Corp., is in talks to raise about $3 billion in a funding round that may triple the company’s valuation, people familiar with the situation said.
items.contentSnippet: Crusoe, the data center upstart with contracts to supply AI computing power for the likes of Meta Platforms Inc. and Oracle Corp., is in talks to raise about $3 billion in a funding round that may triple the company’s valuation, people familiar with the situation said.
items.creator: Bailey Lipschultz, Rebecca Torrence, Edward Ludlow

summaries.zh: 克鲁索公司（Crusoe）正与投资者洽谈，计划融资约30亿美元。此次融资轮可能使公司估值翻三倍。该公司是数据中心新锐企业，已与Meta Platforms和Oracle等公司签订合同，为AI计算提供支持。
summaries.en: Crusoe, a data center company supplying AI computing power to Meta and Oracle, is in talks to raise $3 billion. This funding round could triple the firm's valuation, sources reported. The company's contracts with major tech firms highlight its growing role in the AI computing market.

items.summary: 克鲁索公司（Crusoe）正与投资者洽谈，计划融资约30亿美元。此次融资轮可能使公司估值翻三倍。该公司是数据中心新锐企业，已与Meta Platforms和Oracle等公司签订合同，为AI计算提供支持。

items.title: CEO of Blueprint Capital Advisors Discusses Private Capital Strategies
items.content: Jacob Walthour Jr., CEO of Blueprint Capital Advisors, shares his expertise on account management and fund-to-fund services within private capital strategies. The discussion took place against the backdrop of ongoing redemption tensions in the private credit market, highlighting challenges and opportunities in managing private capital investments. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Jacob Walthour Jr., CEO of Blueprint Capital Advisors, shares his expertise on account management and fund-to-fund services within private capital strategies. The discussion took place against the backdrop of ongoing redemption tensions in the private credit market, highlighting challenges and opportunities in managing private capital investments. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: Blueprint Capital Advisors的CEO Jacob Walthour Jr.在接受采访时，就私募资本策略中的账户管理和基金转基金服务分享见解。讨论背景为私募信贷市场当前的赎回压力，他分析了管理私募资本投资所面临的挑战与机遇。该访谈由Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz主持，来源于彭博社。
summaries.en: Jacob Walthour Jr., CEO of Blueprint Capital Advisors, discusses account management and fund-to-fund services in private capital strategies during a Bloomberg interview with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." The conversation addresses ongoing redemption tensions in the private credit market, emphasizing challenges and opportunities in managing private capital investments.

items.summary: Blueprint Capital Advisors的CEO Jacob Walthour Jr.在接受采访时，就私募资本策略中的账户管理和基金转基金服务分享见解。讨论背景为私募信贷市场当前的赎回压力，他分析了管理私募资本投资所面临的挑战与机遇。该访谈由Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz主持，来源于彭博社。

items.title: South Korean AI Rout Drags Emerging Stocks to Three-Week Low
items.content: Most developing-world currencies rallied on Thursday after weaker-than-expected US employment data prompted investors to scale back bets that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates as soon as this month.
items.contentSnippet: Most developing-world currencies rallied on Thursday after weaker-than-expected US employment data prompted investors to scale back bets that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates as soon as this month.
items.creator: David Feliba, Ray Ndlovu

summaries.zh: 韩国人工智能企业大胜引发新兴市场股票跌至三周低点。受美国就业数据不及预期影响，投资者下调10月美联储加息预期，美元走弱，推动风险资产上涨。新兴市场货币随之反弹。
summaries.en: South Korean AI stocks led emerging markets to a three-week low amid broader sell-off. Weaker-than-expected US employment data reduced expectations for a Fed rate hike in October, strengthening risk assets and weakening the dollar. Developing-world currencies also rose.

items.summary: 韩国人工智能企业大胜引发新兴市场股票跌至三周低点。受美国就业数据不及预期影响，投资者下调10月美联储加息预期，美元走弱，推动风险资产上涨。新兴市场货币随之反弹。

items.title: UBS Sees Tech Sector Resilience Despite Meta
items.content: Nadia Lovell of UBS discussed the recent volatility in tech stocks amid speculation about a strategic pivot by Meta. While some market participants worry that hyperscalers may have overbuilt cloud capacity without corresponding monetization, Lovell views the potential offloading of excess capacity as a constructive move that could improve capital efficiency and margins over time. She emphasized that demand for cloud services remains strong, citing robust cloud revenue growth among hyperscalers and increasing enterprise adoption rates in the U.S. Despite the recent sell-off in certain cloud-related stocks, Lovell believes capital expenditure plans for this year and next are largely set, with limited upside but no immediate slowdown. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Nadia Lovell of UBS discussed the recent volatility in tech stocks amid speculation about a strategic pivot by Meta. While some market participants worry that hyperscalers may have overbuilt cloud capacity without corresponding monetization, Lovell views the potential offloading of excess capacity as a constructive move that could improve capital efficiency and margins over time. She emphasized that demand for cloud services remains strong, citing robust cloud revenue growth among hyperscalers and increasing enterprise adoption rates in the U.S. Despite the recent sell-off in certain cloud-related stocks, Lovell believes capital expenditure plans for this year and next are largely set, with limited upside but no immediate slowdown. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: UBS分析师Nadia Lovell认为，尽管Meta战略可能转向，科技股近期波动仍具韧性。她指出，超大规模企业可能过度建设了云能力，但未来剥离过剩产能有助于提升资本效率。她强调云服务需求强劲，企业采用率持续提高，云收入增长稳健。尽管部分云股近期下跌，但今年和明年的资本支出计划已基本确定，短期内无显著放缓迹象。
summaries.en: UBS analyst Nadia Lovell says the tech sector remains resilient despite Meta's strategic pivot speculation. She notes hyperscalers may offload excess cloud capacity to improve capital efficiency, while demand for cloud services remains strong, supported by robust revenue growth and enterprise adoption. Despite recent volatility in cloud stocks, Lovell believes capital expenditure plans for this year and next are stable with limited upside but no immediate slowdown. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.summary: UBS分析师Nadia Lovell认为，尽管Meta战略可能转向，科技股近期波动仍具韧性。她指出，超大规模企业可能过度建设了云能力，但未来剥离过剩产能有助于提升资本效率。她强调云服务需求强劲，企业采用率持续提高，云收入增长稳健。尽管部分云股近期下跌，但今年和明年的资本支出计划已基本确定，短期内无显著放缓迹象。

items.title: FBI Probes Whether Alarum Unit Is Behind Co-Opted Home Devices
items.content: The FBI is investigating whether a subsidiary of the data-collection firm Alarum Technologies Ltd. had a role in linking customers’ home internet devices without their consent into a network that people can use to disguise their locations, according to documents seen by Bloomberg News and confirmed by people familiar with the situation.
items.contentSnippet: The FBI is investigating whether a subsidiary of the data-collection firm Alarum Technologies Ltd. had a role in linking customers’ home internet devices without their consent into a network that people can use to disguise their locations, according to documents seen by Bloomberg News and confirmed by people familiar with the situation.
items.creator: Jake Bleiberg

summaries.zh: 美国联邦调查局（FBI）正在调查数据收集公司Alarum Technologies Ltd.的子公司是否未经用户同意，将家用互联网设备连接到一个用于隐藏用户地理位置的网络。该调查基于彭博新闻的报道，并得到知情人士的证实。
summaries.en: The FBI is investigating whether Alarum Technologies' subsidiary co-opted home internet devices without consent to link them into a network for concealing locations. Documents seen by Bloomberg News and confirmed by insiders support this probe. The investigation examines the subsidiary's potential role in this unauthorized activity.

items.summary: 美国联邦调查局（FBI）正在调查数据收集公司Alarum Technologies Ltd.的子公司是否未经用户同意，将家用互联网设备连接到一个用于隐藏用户地理位置的网络。该调查基于彭博新闻的报道，并得到知情人士的证实。

items.title: Software Developers Rethink Apps for Their Newest Users: AI Agents
items.content: Potential adjustments range from rethinking pricing and permissions to overhauling designs
items.contentSnippet: Potential adjustments range from rethinking pricing and permissions to overhauling designs
items.creator: Dina Bass

summaries.zh: 软件开发者正重新设计应用程序以适应其最新用户：AI代理。潜在的调整包括重新考虑定价和权限，甚至彻底改变设计。这些变化旨在更好地满足AI代理的需求，以提升用户体验和功能效率。
summaries.en: Software developers are adapting apps to accommodate AI agents as new users. Potential adjustments include rethinking pricing models, permissions, and redesigning user interfaces to better integrate with AI functionalities. These changes aim to enhance compatibility and usability for AI agents, reflecting the growing role of AI in technology.

items.summary: 软件开发者正重新设计应用程序以适应其最新用户：AI代理。潜在的调整包括重新考虑定价和权限，甚至彻底改变设计。这些变化旨在更好地满足AI代理的需求，以提升用户体验和功能效率。

items.title: Spotify Challenges Prediction Markets After Song Chart Rigging
items.content: Spotify has asked Kalshi and Polymarket to remove its logo and clarify that neither company has a partnership with the streaming service after it identified users manipulating rankings that are tied to prediction market bets.
items.contentSnippet: Spotify has asked Kalshi and Polymarket to remove its logo and clarify that neither company has a partnership with the streaming service after it identified users manipulating rankings that are tied to prediction market bets.
items.creator: Denitsa Tsekova

summaries.zh: Spotify指控预测市场用户操纵与其歌曲排行榜相关的投注排名。为此，Spotify要求Kalshi和Polymarket移除其标志，并澄清两家公司与其无合作关系。此举旨在维护市场公平性。
summaries.en: Spotify has challenged prediction markets, specifically Kalshi and Polymarket, over song chart rigging. The company requested the removal of its logo and clarified that no partnership exists between Spotify and these platforms. This action followed Spotify's discovery of users manipulating rankings linked to prediction market bets. The move underscores Spotify's stance against unauthorized interference in its chart data.

items.summary: Spotify指控预测市场用户操纵与其歌曲排行榜相关的投注排名。为此，Spotify要求Kalshi和Polymarket移除其标志，并澄清两家公司与其无合作关系。此举旨在维护市场公平性。

items.title: Invesco’s Brill Gives SpaceX Bond a Red Card for ‘Very Sloppy’ Performance
items.content: Invesco Advisers Inc.’s head of investment-grade credit for North America slammed SpaceX’s inaugural bond sale on Thursday for a “very sloppy” secondary market performance.
items.contentSnippet: Invesco Advisers Inc.’s head of investment-grade credit for North America slammed SpaceX’s inaugural bond sale on Thursday for a “very sloppy” secondary market performance.
items.creator: Charlotte Plaskwa

summaries.zh: 富国投资北美投资级信贷负责人布里尔周四批评SpaceX首笔债券发行在二级市场的表现“非常混乱”。
summaries.en: Invesco Advisers' head of North American investment-grade credit criticized SpaceX's inaugural bond sale for its "very sloppy" secondary market performance. The statement highlights issues with the bond's handling in the secondary market.

items.summary: 富国投资北美投资级信贷负责人布里尔周四批评SpaceX首笔债券发行在二级市场的表现“非常混乱”。

items.title: Top ‘Suicide Squad’ Developers Say the Flop Made Them Not Want to Make Games Anymore
items.content: The director and top designer of Rocksteady’s failed game open up about their experiences
items.contentSnippet: The director and top designer of Rocksteady’s failed game open up about their experiences
items.creator: Jason Schreier

summaries.zh: 《自杀小队》开发团队主创谈失败经历：游戏失利让他们不再想制作游戏。该游戏由Rocksteady开发，但因表现不佳而成为失败之作。导演和首席设计师分享了他们的经历，透露这次挫折让他们对游戏开发失去热情。
summaries.en: The director and top designer of Rocksteady’s unsuccessful "Suicide Squad" game discuss their experiences, revealing that the project's failure made them reluctant to pursue game development further. The article highlights their candid reflections on the setback and its impact on their careers. (Word count: 50)

items.summary: 《自杀小队》开发团队主创谈失败经历：游戏失利让他们不再想制作游戏。该游戏由Rocksteady开发，但因表现不佳而成为失败之作。导演和首席设计师分享了他们的经历，透露这次挫折让他们对游戏开发失去热情。

items.title: ElevenLabs in Talks for Tender Offer at $22 Billion Valuation
items.content: ElevenLabs has held early talks with investors to let employees sell shares in a secondary offering that would value the artificial intelligence startup at roughly $22 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.
items.contentSnippet: ElevenLabs has held early talks with investors to let employees sell shares in a secondary offering that would value the artificial intelligence startup at roughly $22 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.
items.creator: Natasha Mascarenhas, Yazhou Sun

summaries.zh: 据消息人士透露，人工智能创业公司ElevenLabs正与投资者进行初步谈判，计划通过二次发行让员工出售股份，此举将使公司估值约为220亿美元。
summaries.en: ElevenLabs is in discussions with investors for a tender offer that could value the AI startup at around $22 billion. The offering would allow employees to sell shares in a secondary transaction. The talks indicate potential interest in supporting the company's valuation, though no final agreement has been reached. The details are based on insights from individuals familiar with the matter.

items.summary: 据消息人士透露，人工智能创业公司ElevenLabs正与投资者进行初步谈判，计划通过二次发行让员工出售股份，此举将使公司估值约为220亿美元。

items.title: Microsoft's 6,000-Person AI Push
items.content: Microsoft is building a 6,000-person AI deployment team to help businesses implement artificial intelligence.  Bloomberg' Tech co-host Ed Ludlow explains why the move mirrors the forward deployment engineer model pioneered by Palantir and adopted by AWS, and why hands-on AI implementation could be the key to unlocking enterprise ROI. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Microsoft is building a 6,000-person AI deployment team to help businesses implement artificial intelligence.  Bloomberg' Tech co-host Ed Ludlow explains why the move mirrors the forward deployment engineer model pioneered by Palantir and adopted by AWS, and why hands-on AI implementation could be the key to unlocking enterprise ROI. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 微软正在组建一支6000人的AI部署团队，协助企业实施人工智能。据彭博报道，此举借鉴了Palantir首创并由AWS采用的“前沿部署工程师”模式，通过实际操作AI来提升企业投资回报。
summaries.en: Microsoft is expanding its AI capabilities by creating a 6,000-member deployment team focused on helping businesses implement artificial intelligence. This initiative mirrors the forward deployment engineer model pioneered by Palantir and adopted by AWS, emphasizing hands-on AI implementation as crucial for unlocking enterprise ROI. The team aims to assist companies in integrating AI technologies effectively.

items.summary: 微软正在组建一支6000人的AI部署团队，协助企业实施人工智能。据彭博报道，此举借鉴了Palantir首创并由AWS采用的“前沿部署工程师”模式，通过实际操作AI来提升企业投资回报。

items.title: Tesla Deliveries Jump 25% | Bloomberg Tech 7/02/2026
items.content: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down reports that OpenAI is holding early-stage discussions about giving the US government a 5% equity stake. Plus, Tesla's delivery numbers rose 25% from a year ago, beating Wall Street's expectations by a wide margin. And, he CEO of Microsoft's commercial business discusses the tech giant's plan to set up a new organization with 6,000 employees to help businesses use AI. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down reports that OpenAI is holding early-stage discussions about giving the US government a 5% equity stake. Plus, Tesla's delivery numbers rose 25% from a year ago, beating Wall Street's expectations by a wide margin. And, he CEO of Microsoft's commercial business discusses the tech giant's plan to set up a new organization with 6,000 employees to help businesses use AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 特斯拉交付量同比增长25%，大幅超出华尔街预期。此外，OpenAI正与美国政府探讨为其提供5%股权的可能性，微软商业部门CEO则透露公司将成立一个6000人的新部门，助力企业应用AI。（信息来源：彭博社）
summaries.en: Tesla deliveries increased by 25% year-over-year, exceeding Wall Street expectations significantly. Bloomberg also reports early-stage discussions between OpenAI and the US government regarding a potential 5% equity stake for the government. Additionally, Microsoft plans to create a new organization with 6,000 employees to assist businesses in adopting AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.summary: 特斯拉交付量同比增长25%，大幅超出华尔街预期。此外，OpenAI正与美国政府探讨为其提供5%股权的可能性，微软商业部门CEO则透露公司将成立一个6000人的新部门，助力企业应用AI。（信息来源：彭博社）

items.title: Jobs Report Signals Cooling Labor Market | Open Interest 7/2/2026
items.content: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." US hiring slows sharply in June as Wall Street weighs what comes next. The Nasdaq fights back as Meta reshapes the global AI race, and OpenAI is reportedly considering giving the U.S. government a 5% stake. White House NEC Director Kevin Hassett reacts live to the jobs report, BlackRock's Rick Rieder breaks down the market impact, Revelio Labs explains how AI is creating jobs despite slower hiring, and Bridgepoint's $1.4 billion real estate bet points to a potential decade-long investment boom. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." US hiring slows sharply in June as Wall Street weighs what comes next. The Nasdaq fights back as Meta reshapes the global AI race, and OpenAI is reportedly considering giving the U.S. government a 5% stake. White House NEC Director Kevin Hassett reacts live to the jobs report, BlackRock's Rick Rieder breaks down the market impact, Revelio Labs explains how AI is creating jobs despite slower hiring, and Bridgepoint's $1.4 billion real estate bet points to a potential decade-long investment boom. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 6月美国就业增长显著放缓，市场关注后续走向。纳斯达克反弹，Meta引领全球AI竞争，OpenAI或向美国政府出售5%股权。白宫、黑石、Revelio Labs及Bridgepoint等机构对市场影响进行分析。AI发展或抵消就业放缓，Bridgepoint投资14亿美元房地产，暗示未来十年投资热潮。（源自彭博）
summaries.en: The June US jobs report shows a sharp slowdown in hiring, signaling a cooling labor market. Wall Street analyzes the implications. The Nasdaq recovers as Meta advances in AI, while OpenAI considers a 5% US government stake. Experts discuss market impacts, AI's job-creation potential amid slower hiring, and a potential $1.4 billion real estate investment trend. (Word count: 50)

items.summary: 6月美国就业增长显著放缓，市场关注后续走向。纳斯达克反弹，Meta引领全球AI竞争，OpenAI或向美国政府出售5%股权。白宫、黑石、Revelio Labs及Bridgepoint等机构对市场影响进行分析。AI发展或抵消就业放缓，Bridgepoint投资14亿美元房地产，暗示未来十年投资热潮。（源自彭博）

items.title: Nuclear Reactor Powers Nvidia AI Chip in US First
items.content: Valar Atomics, a California-based nuclear startup, generated power from an advanced reactor to run an Nvidia AI chip. While just a trickle of electricity was produced, it’s the first time a next-gen reactor has done so in the US. On the heels of a demonstration of Valar’s Ward 250 reactor connecting to the Nvidia Blackwell chip at the company’s site in Utah, Valar Atomics CEO Isaiah Taylor joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Valar Atomics, a California-based nuclear startup, generated power from an advanced reactor to run an Nvidia AI chip. While just a trickle of electricity was produced, it’s the first time a next-gen reactor has done so in the US. On the heels of a demonstration of Valar’s Ward 250 reactor connecting to the Nvidia Blackwell chip at the company’s site in Utah, Valar Atomics CEO Isaiah Taylor joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 加州核能初创公司Valar Atomics利用其先进反应堆发电，成功驱动了英伟达AI芯片，这是美国首次实现下一代反应堆供电。Valar的Ward 250反应堆已连接至英伟达Blackwell芯片，CEO Isaiah Taylor在彭博科技节目中对此进行说明。此举标志着核能与美国尖端AI技术的结合迈出重要一步。
summaries.en: Valar Atomics, a California-based nuclear startup, powered an Nvidia AI chip using electricity generated from its advanced Ward 250 reactor, marking the first time a next-generation nuclear reactor has done so in the U.S. The demonstration, which involved a small amount of electricity, took place at Valar's site in Utah. CEO Isaiah Taylor discussed the milestone on "Bloomberg Tech." (58 words)

items.summary: 加州核能初创公司Valar Atomics利用其先进反应堆发电，成功驱动了英伟达AI芯片，这是美国首次实现下一代反应堆供电。Valar的Ward 250反应堆已连接至英伟达Blackwell芯片，CEO Isaiah Taylor在彭博科技节目中对此进行说明。此举标志着核能与美国尖端AI技术的结合迈出重要一步。

items.title: Microsoft Shifts Strategy on Enterprise AI
items.content: Microsoft is mobilizing 6,000 employees in a new unit aimed at helping enterprise clients better utilize AI. Judson Althoff, CEO of Microsoft's commercial business, discusses what is driving this move and what impact Microsoft hopes to see. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Microsoft is mobilizing 6,000 employees in a new unit aimed at helping enterprise clients better utilize AI. Judson Althoff, CEO of Microsoft's commercial business, discusses what is driving this move and what impact Microsoft hopes to see. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 微软将调动6000名员工组建新部门，旨在帮助企业客户更好地利用人工智能。微软商业业务CEO Judson Althoff在“Bloomberg Tech”节目中与Ed Ludlow讨论了此举的动机及预期影响。（来源：彭博）
summaries.en: Microsoft is launching a new unit with 6,000 employees to assist enterprise clients in leveraging AI. Judson Althoff, CEO of Microsoft's commercial business, explains the rationale behind this strategic shift and its expected impact during an interview on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

items.summary: 微软将调动6000名员工组建新部门，旨在帮助企业客户更好地利用人工智能。微软商业业务CEO Judson Althoff在“Bloomberg Tech”节目中与Ed Ludlow讨论了此举的动机及预期影响。（来源：彭博）

items.title: IQM CEO Explains Quantum's Big Opportunity
items.content: IQM Quantum Computers CEO Jan Goetz joined Open Interest to explain why his company chose a Nasdaq listing, why quantum computing could solve problems impossible for today's supercomputers, and why he believes the AI boom is accelerating the future of quantum technology. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: IQM Quantum Computers CEO Jan Goetz joined Open Interest to explain why his company chose a Nasdaq listing, why quantum computing could solve problems impossible for today's supercomputers, and why he believes the AI boom is accelerating the future of quantum technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: IQM量子计算机CEO简·戈茨在Open Interest节目中解释了公司选择在纳斯达克上市的原因。他认为量子计算能够解决传统超级计算机无法处理的问题，并指出人工智能的蓬勃发展正在加速量子技术的发展。(信息来源：彭博)
summaries.en: IQM Quantum Computers CEO Jan Goetz discussed with Open Interest the reasons for his company's Nasdaq listing, the potential of quantum computing to solve problems beyond current supercomputers, and how the AI boom is speeding up quantum technology's development. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.summary: IQM量子计算机CEO简·戈茨在Open Interest节目中解释了公司选择在纳斯达克上市的原因。他认为量子计算能够解决传统超级计算机无法处理的问题，并指出人工智能的蓬勃发展正在加速量子技术的发展。(信息来源：彭博)

items.title: Kayne Anderson CEO on Bridgepoint Deal
items.content: Bridgepoint is making a $1.4 billion bet on US real estate. Kayne Anderson Real Estate Co-Founder and CEO Al Rabil says it's all about preparing for a "10-year supercycle." He joins Open Interest to explain why AI infrastructure, healthcare real estate, and long-term demographic trends are creating massive investment opportunities, and why the merger preserves his firm's autonomy while unlocking far more capital. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Bridgepoint is making a $1.4 billion bet on US real estate. Kayne Anderson Real Estate Co-Founder and CEO Al Rabil says it's all about preparing for a "10-year supercycle." He joins Open Interest to explain why AI infrastructure, healthcare real estate, and long-term demographic trends are creating massive investment opportunities, and why the merger preserves his firm's autonomy while unlocking far more capital. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 凯恩·安德森房地产公司联合创始人兼CEO阿隆·拉比尔表示，桥点资本正以140亿美元押注美国房地产，旨在为“十年超级周期”做准备。他接受Open Interest采访时解释称，人工智能基础设施、医疗房地产及长期人口趋势将带来巨大投资机会，同时合并将保持公司自主性并释放更多资本。（信息来源：彭博）
summaries.en: Kayne Anderson Real Estate Co-Founder and CEO Al Rabil discusses Bridgepoint's $1.4 billion investment in US real estate, positioning it as a "10-year supercycle" play. He highlights AI infrastructure, healthcare real estate, and demographic trends as key drivers of opportunity. Rabil explains the merger preserves firm autonomy while unlocking additional capital. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.summary: 凯恩·安德森房地产公司联合创始人兼CEO阿隆·拉比尔表示，桥点资本正以140亿美元押注美国房地产，旨在为“十年超级周期”做准备。他接受Open Interest采访时解释称，人工智能基础设施、医疗房地产及长期人口趋势将带来巨大投资机会，同时合并将保持公司自主性并释放更多资本。（信息来源：彭博）

items.title: Tesla's Big Beat Raises Questions
items.content: Tesla stunned Wall Street with a massive second-quarter delivery beat, While production also topped forecasts, the company offered virtually no commentary or explanation, leaving investors with more questions than answers. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Tesla stunned Wall Street with a massive second-quarter delivery beat, While production also topped forecasts, the company offered virtually no commentary or explanation, leaving investors with more questions than answers. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 特斯拉第二季度交付量大幅超出预期，产量也超预期，但公司几乎未提供任何评论或解释，令投资者疑虑重重。(消息来源：彭博社)
summaries.en: Tesla exceeded Wall Street's second-quarter delivery expectations with a significant beat, while production also surpassed forecasts. However, the company provided little commentary or explanation, leaving investors with numerous unanswered questions. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.summary: 特斯拉第二季度交付量大幅超出预期，产量也超预期，但公司几乎未提供任何评论或解释，令投资者疑虑重重。(消息来源：彭博社)

items.title: Canada’s Pembina Advances Gas-Fired Data Center Project
items.content: Pembina Pipeline Corp. will move ahead with a project build a C$4.6 billion ($3.2 billion) gas-fired electricity plant that will power a data center project in Alberta.
items.contentSnippet: Pembina Pipeline Corp. will move ahead with a project build a C$4.6 billion ($3.2 billion) gas-fired electricity plant that will power a data center project in Alberta.
items.creator: Robert Tuttle

summaries.zh: 加拿大Pembina公司计划投资46亿加元（32亿美元）在阿尔伯塔省建设一个燃气发电厂，为数据中心项目供电。该项目将使用天然气作为燃料，为数据中心提供电力支持。
summaries.en: Pembina Pipeline Corp. is proceeding with a C$4.6 billion ($3.2 billion) project to construct a gas-fired electricity plant in Alberta. The plant will power a data center project.

items.summary: 加拿大Pembina公司计划投资46亿加元（32亿美元）在阿尔伯塔省建设一个燃气发电厂，为数据中心项目供电。该项目将使用天然气作为燃料，为数据中心提供电力支持。

items.title: Microsoft Mobilizes 6,000 Workers to Help Customers Adopt AI
items.content: Microsoft Corp. is setting up a new organization with 6,000 employees to help businesses with the technical and strategic work of deploying artificial intelligence.
items.contentSnippet: Microsoft Corp. is setting up a new organization with 6,000 employees to help businesses with the technical and strategic work of deploying artificial intelligence.
items.creator: Brody Ford, Edward Ludlow

summaries.zh: 微软成立新部门，调配6000名员工协助企业部署人工智能，提供技术和战略支持。此举旨在帮助企业顺利采用AI技术。
summaries.en: Microsoft is creating a new division with 6,000 workers to assist businesses in implementing artificial intelligence. The team will focus on providing technical and strategic support for AI adoption.

items.summary: 微软成立新部门，调配6000名员工协助企业部署人工智能，提供技术和战略支持。此举旨在帮助企业顺利采用AI技术。

items.title: China’s Kling AI Raises $2 Billion to Expand AI Video
items.content: China’s Kling AI has raised an initial $2 billion in venture capital funding as the spinoff from Kuaishou Technology seeks to expand its video AI operations.
items.contentSnippet: China’s Kling AI has raised an initial $2 billion in venture capital funding as the spinoff from Kuaishou Technology seeks to expand its video AI operations.
items.creator: Zheping Huang

summaries.zh: 中国Kling AI通过风险投资获得了2亿美元的首轮融资，作为快手科技的分拆公司，该公司计划扩大其视频人工智能业务。
summaries.en: China’s Kling AI, a spinoff from Kuaishou Technology, has secured $2 billion in venture capital funding to expand its AI video operations. The company aims to leverage the investment to grow its capabilities and market presence in the AI video sector.

items.summary: 中国Kling AI通过风险投资获得了2亿美元的首轮融资，作为快手科技的分拆公司，该公司计划扩大其视频人工智能业务。

items.title: AI Race Fuels New Fears of Crowded Trading
items.content:
Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday, tracking tech losses on Wall Street after Meta Platforms Inc.’s plan to develop a business that would sell access to AI computing power raised worries about overcapacity.
Brian Belski, CEO and founder at Humilis Investments, discusses the recent tech sector rout and what stocks he is keeping an eye on. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet:
Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday, tracking tech losses on Wall Street after Meta Platforms Inc.’s plan to develop a business that would sell access to AI computing power raised worries about overcapacity.
Brian Belski, CEO and founder at Humilis Investments, discusses the recent tech sector rout and what stocks he is keeping an eye on. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 亚洲半导体股于周四下跌，追踪华尔街科技股损失，因Meta计划开发出售AI计算能力业务引发对产能过剩的担忧。分析师讨论了近期科技股暴跌及关注股。
summaries.en: Asian semiconductor stocks fell on Thursday amid tech losses on Wall Street, triggered by Meta's plan to sell AI computing power access, which sparked fears of overcapacity in the sector. The decline reflects broader concerns about the AI race and potential market saturation.

items.summary: 亚洲半导体股于周四下跌，追踪华尔街科技股损失，因Meta计划开发出售AI计算能力业务引发对产能过剩的担忧。分析师讨论了近期科技股暴跌及关注股。

items.title: SAP Restricts Hiring, Travel to Fund ‘Significant’ AI Push
items.content: SAP SE said it will cut back hiring and travel to save costs as Europe’s largest software company devotes more resources to developing artificial intelligence technologies and fending off new competitors.
items.contentSnippet: SAP SE said it will cut back hiring and travel to save costs as Europe’s largest software company devotes more resources to developing artificial intelligence technologies and fending off new competitors.
items.creator: Christina Kyriasoglou

summaries.zh: SAP SE将削减招聘和差旅开支以节省成本，同时将更多资源投入人工智能技术研发，以应对新竞争对手的挑战。此举旨在支持公司“重大”的AI战略。
summaries.en: SAP SE will reduce hiring and travel expenses to fund a "significant" push into artificial intelligence development. The move aims to support the company's growth in AI technologies while competing against new rivals. Europe's largest software firm is reallocating resources to maintain its market position.

items.summary: SAP SE将削减招聘和差旅开支以节省成本，同时将更多资源投入人工智能技术研发，以应对新竞争对手的挑战。此举旨在支持公司“重大”的AI战略。

items.title: Anthropic in Talks With Samsung for Custom AI Chip: Information
items.content: Anthropic PBC is in talks with Samsung Electronics Co. to be a manufacturing partner for a custom artificial intelligence chip, the Information said, citing people familiar with the plan.
items.contentSnippet: Anthropic PBC is in talks with Samsung Electronics Co. to be a manufacturing partner for a custom artificial intelligence chip, the Information said, citing people familiar with the plan.
items.creator: Amy Thomson

summaries.zh: 安腾公司（Anthropic PBC）正与三星电子洽谈，寻求为其定制人工智能芯片的代工合作，据《信息》报援引知情人士消息称，双方已进入讨论阶段。
summaries.en: Anthropic PBC is in discussions with Samsung Electronics Co. to collaborate on developing a custom AI chip. The Information reports these talks, citing sources familiar with the plans. The potential partnership aims to create a specialized chip for artificial intelligence applications, though no further details on the collaboration were provided.

items.summary: 安腾公司（Anthropic PBC）正与三星电子洽谈，寻求为其定制人工智能芯片的代工合作，据《信息》报援引知情人士消息称，双方已进入讨论阶段。

items.title: Why Marlinspike Is Investing in America's Defense Boom
items.content: Marlinspike Partners just raised an oversubscribed $127 million Fund II to "rearm America," the latest sign that investors are piling into defense startups. Marlinspike co-founder and CEO Neil Keegan, who also served six years as a US Navy Surface Warfare Officer, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Marlinspike Partners just raised an oversubscribed $127 million Fund II to "rearm America," the latest sign that investors are piling into defense startups. Marlinspike co-founder and CEO Neil Keegan, who also served six years as a US Navy Surface Warfare Officer, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 马林斯皮克合伙人（Marlinspike Partners）新募集了1.27亿美元（超预期）的II期基金，旨在“重整美国国防”，显示投资者正积极投资国防初创企业。马林斯皮克联合创始人兼CEO尼尔·基根（Neil Keegan）曾担任六年美国海军水面作战军官，在“彭博科技”节目上接受埃德·拉多（Ed Ludlow）采访。
summaries.en: Marlinspike Partners raised $127 million for Fund II to support U.S. defense startups, signaling strong investor interest in the sector. Co-founder and CEO Neil Keegan, a former U.S. Navy Surface Warfare Officer, discussed the investment on "Bloomberg Tech," emphasizing the need to "rearm America." The oversubscribed fund reflects the growing defense boom. (98 words)

items.summary: 马林斯皮克合伙人（Marlinspike Partners）新募集了1.27亿美元（超预期）的II期基金，旨在“重整美国国防”，显示投资者正积极投资国防初创企业。马林斯皮克联合创始人兼CEO尼尔·基根（Neil Keegan）曾担任六年美国海军水面作战军官，在“彭博科技”节目上接受埃德·拉多（Ed Ludlow）采访。

items.title: Congo Plans First Stock Market as AI Mineral Boom Draws Interest
items.content: The Democratic Republic of Congo is drawing up plans for its first stock exchange as it seeks to attract more investment to an economy that’s benefiting from soaring demand for minerals critical to the artificial intelligence buildout.
items.contentSnippet: The Democratic Republic of Congo is drawing up plans for its first stock exchange as it seeks to attract more investment to an economy that’s benefiting from soaring demand for minerals critical to the artificial intelligence buildout.
items.creator: Ray Ndlovu

summaries.zh: 刚果（金）正筹备建立首个证券交易所，旨在吸引更多投资。随着人工智能（AI）发展带动关键矿产需求激增，该国经济正受益于此。此举旨在利用矿产热潮带来的经济机遇，推动股市发展。
summaries.en: The Democratic Republic of Congo is developing its first stock exchange to attract investment amid rising demand for AI-related minerals. The plan aims to capitalize on the economic benefits of the mineral boom, which supports AI development. The initiative seeks to boost investment in the country's economy.

items.summary: 刚果（金）正筹备建立首个证券交易所，旨在吸引更多投资。随着人工智能（AI）发展带动关键矿产需求激增，该国经济正受益于此。此举旨在利用矿产热潮带来的经济机遇，推动股市发展。

items.title: SpaceX Analyst Debut Set to Test $2.2 Trillion Valuation
items.content: Investors in SpaceX have been largely flying blind since the company’s record-breaking IPO last month, with few financial projections to help determine what the stock is actually worth.
items.contentSnippet: Investors in SpaceX have been largely flying blind since the company’s record-breaking IPO last month, with few financial projections to help determine what the stock is actually worth.
items.creator: Carmen Reinicke

summaries.zh: SpaceX的IPO创下纪录后，投资者对其估值一直缺乏明确依据。目前，公司尚未提供详细的财务预测，导致市场对其真实价值难以判断。即将推出的分析师报告旨在填补这一空白，为投资者提供更多参考。此举或有助于评估SpaceX的$2.2万亿美元估值是否合理。
summaries.en: SpaceX's record IPO last month raised $2.2 trillion, but investors lack clear financial projections to assess its true value. A new analyst debut aims to provide insights, addressing the uncertainty that followed the company's initial public offering.

items.summary: SpaceX的IPO创下纪录后，投资者对其估值一直缺乏明确依据。目前，公司尚未提供详细的财务预测，导致市场对其真实价值难以判断。即将推出的分析师报告旨在填补这一空白，为投资者提供更多参考。此举或有助于评估SpaceX的$2.2万亿美元估值是否合理。

items.title: South Africa’s Grocery War Shifts From Search to AI Conversation
items.content: South Africa’s online grocery battle is entering a new phase where the competition is no longer just about delivering groceries faster, but rather about making shopping itself almost disappear.
items.contentSnippet: South Africa’s online grocery battle is entering a new phase where the competition is no longer just about delivering groceries faster, but rather about making shopping itself almost disappear.
items.creator: Janice Kew

summaries.zh: 南非生鲜电商竞争进入新阶段，焦点从提升配送速度转向通过人工智能实现购物自动化，力求让购物过程几乎消失。
summaries.en: South Africa’s online grocery competition is evolving from a focus on faster delivery to leveraging AI-driven conversations. The new phase aims to make shopping nearly effortless for consumers, marking a shift in the industry’s competitive strategy.

items.summary: 南非生鲜电商竞争进入新阶段，焦点从提升配送速度转向通过人工智能实现购物自动化，力求让购物过程几乎消失。

items.title: How Phone Culture Is Reshaping Chinese Society
items.content:
Think smartphones dominate American culture? China may have taken the mobile-first lifestyle to another level.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Dan Wang, author of Breakneck, joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss how phone culture is reshaping Chinese society — from ordering a croissant for delivery in minutes to livestreaming shopping trips at the mall. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet:
Think smartphones dominate American culture? China may have taken the mobile-first lifestyle to another level.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Dan Wang, author of Breakneck, joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss how phone culture is reshaping Chinese society — from ordering a croissant for delivery in minutes to livestreaming shopping trips at the mall. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh:
智能手机如何重塑中国社会？

播客《Odd Lots》中，作者丹·王与主持人讨论了手机文化如何深刻改变中国社会。从快速点单到直播购物，中国正将移动生活方式推向新高度。
summaries.en: Smartphone culture is profoundly reshaping Chinese society, as discussed on the Odd Lots podcast. Dan Wang, author of *Breakneck*, joined hosts Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to highlight how mobile technology enables instant services like delivering a croissant within minutes and live-streaming shopping experiences at malls. The conversation underscores China's advanced mobile-first lifestyle, setting a high bar globally.

items.summary:
智能手机如何重塑中国社会？

播客《Odd Lots》中，作者丹·王与主持人讨论了手机文化如何深刻改变中国社会。从快速点单到直播购物，中国正将移动生活方式推向新高度。
